_comment: Shared, NON-SECRET MCP server definitions — single source of truth for both Claude Code (~/.claude.json) and Claude Desktop. NO Docker: every server here is a plain stdio launcher (npx/go). Secret env values (karakeep token) are injected at apply time from OpenBao by the merge scripts. Three servers are NOT listed here because their shape differs per-app or per-OS and the merge scripts inject them: github + outline are remote HTTP (http for Code, npx mcp-remote bridge for Desktop) with a baked Bearer token; signal is a per-OS stdio launcher (uv path + repo dir differ macOS vs Linux) talking to the signal-cli daemon (tcp 127.0.0.1:7583). Edit here, then chezmoi apply.
